# `pin` - database schema slice

Source of truth: [`backend/prisma/schema.prisma`](../../../prisma/schema.prisma).
This file mirrors the Prisma models owned by this feature so the schema is
co-located with the code that reads/writes it. Regenerate via:

```bash
pwsh backend/scripts/scaffold-feature-schemas.ps1
```

## `UserPin`

```prisma
model UserPin {
  id             String    @id @default(uuid())
  userId         String    @unique
  pinHash        String
  keyBackup      String?
  expiresAt      DateTime
  isActive       Boolean   @default(true)
  failedAttempts Int       @default(0)
  lockedUntil    DateTime?
  // Timestamp of the last successful PIN verify/create. Used by the
  // verify-security step-up endpoint to require a recent proof before issuing
  // a security token (closes the "issue token without proof" bypass).
  lastVerifiedAt DateTime?
  createdAt      DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime  @updatedAt
  user           User      @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([expiresAt])
  @@index([isActive])
  @@index([userId])
  @@schema("public")
}
```
